steps.title: Estimate the slope
steps.content:
Two readable points from the graph are $(0{,}65)$ and $(100{,}105)$. The slope is
$$\frac{105-65}{100-0}=\frac{40}{100}=\frac{2}{5}$$

steps.title: Check the model values
steps.content: A model for the graph is $$t(x)=65+\frac{2}{5}x$$ This gives $t(0)=65$, so the statement about $0\%$ GC content is consistent with the graph.

steps.title: Compare high percentages
steps.content:
Evaluate the model at the high percentages.
$$t(95)=65+38=103$$
$$t(98)=65+39.2=104.2$$
The value for $98\%$ is not between $80^\circ\text{C}$ and $90^\circ\text{C}$. The answer is D.
